channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $25 per order, free on orders over $350.

item.g:title: Blue Soft Net Monotone Beads Handwork Lehenga Choli Online
item.g:description: This beautiful Blue Soft Net lehenga choli is crafted with detailed Pearls, Beads and Cutdana Handwork that brings out the richness of traditional Indian craftsmanship. This fully stitched lehenga features a graceful silhouette with Double Can Can for that perfect flared look that moves beautifully with every step. Looking for ready to wear Indian ethnic clothing? This blue monotone party wear lehenga is fully stitched to your chosen size or custom measurements — no tailor visits needed after delivery. The intricate handwork on the blouse extends to the front, back, and sleeves, ensuring you look stunning from every angle. The matching dupatta completes the ensemble with a coordinated, event-ready look. Key Components: Lehenga: Soft Net With Silk Lining and Double Can Can Blouse: Soft Net With Silk Lining and Full work Front, Back & Sleeves Dupatta: Designer Soft Net Dupatta Perfect For: Sangeet, Reception, Engagement Custom Measurements Option: Choose "Custom Measurements" and we will stitch this lehenga to your exact body measurements for a perfect, personalized fit. Simply select the custom measurements variant and share your details after ordering. Custom measurements add $35 and take approximately 7 additional business days. Care Instructions: Dry clean only. Store in a cool, dry place. Handle with care to preserve the delicate handwork. Note: Color may vary slightly due to photographic lighting and screen settings. Every outfit is fully stitched and ready to wear upon delivery. Color: Blue

item.g:title: Yellow Viscose Silk Wedding Embroidery Saree
item.g:description: This stunning yellow viscose silk saree with intricate embroidery is the perfect choice for brides and wedding guests seeking elegance and tradition. Crafted for special occasions like weddings, receptions, and mehendi ceremonies, this unstitched saree comes with a matching blouse piece to create your dream bridal look. Why Brides Choose Yellow Viscose Silk Sarees Yellow viscose silk sarees are a popular choice for brides and wedding guests because they symbolize prosperity, joy, and new beginnings. The rich, lustrous fabric drapes beautifully, creating a regal silhouette that photographs exceptionally well. Viscose silk offers the luxurious feel of traditional silk with added durability, making it perfect for all-day wedding celebrations. The vibrant yellow hue complements various skin tones and stands out beautifully in wedding photography, ensuring you'll make a memorable impression on your special day. What Makes This Embroidery Saree Special The embroidery work on this saree showcases meticulous craftsmanship with detailed patterns that add texture and dimension to the fabric. Each stitch is carefully placed by skilled artisans, creating a harmonious blend of traditional techniques and contemporary design. The embroidery features a combination of zari, resham, and sometimes stone or mirror work, depending on the specific design. This attention to detail transforms the saree from beautiful to extraordinary, making it a true heirloom piece that can be passed down through generations while maintaining its elegance and charm. Perfect For These Occasions Weddings - As a bride, bridesmaid, or wedding guest, this saree will make you stand out with its vibrant color and exquisite craftsmanship. Receptions - The sophisticated embroidery and luxurious fabric make it ideal for evening wedding receptions where you want to make a statement. Mehendi & Sangeet - Perfect for pre-wedding celebrations where you can showcase your style while participating in traditional ceremonies. Engagement Parties - A beautiful choice for engagement celebrations or other formal family gatherings where ethnic wear is expected. How to Style This Yellow Saree To complete your bridal look, pair this yellow saree with traditional gold jewelry for a classic, regal appearance. Consider wearing statement earrings, a matha patti, and a set of bangles to enhance the embroidery work. For footwear, opt for embellished juttis or heels in gold or metallic shades. The unstitched blouse piece allows you to customize the neckline and sleeve style to suit your personal preference—consider a deep back or off-shoulder design for added glamour. Style your hair in a traditional bun with fresh flowers or wear it down with soft waves for a more contemporary look that still honors tradition. Saree Sizing, Care & Shipping Sizing: This is a 6.2-meter unstitched saree with a 0.8-meter blouse piece. Custom tailoring services are available upon request for an additional fee. Care: Dry clean only to preserve the embroidery and fabric quality. Store in a saree bag away from direct sunlight to maintain the color and fabric integrity. Shipping: Free shipping on orders over $350. Standard shipping takes 7-10 business days via DHL/USPS/UPS to USA, Canada, and Australia with tracking provided. Frequently Asked Questions Q: Is this sareee suitable for a destination wedding?A: Absolutely! The viscose silk fabric is lightweight yet luxurious, making it comfortable for destination weddings while maintaining its elegant appearance. Q: Can I get the blouse stitched by LuxeMia?A: Yes, we offer professional stitching services for an additional fee. Our tailors will create a custom-fit blouse based on your measurements provided during checkout. Q: How does the color appear in real life compared to the photos?A: While we strive to show accurate colors, the shade may vary slightly due to lighting and screen settings. The actual saree has a rich, vibrant yellow hue with beautiful embroidery details. The LuxeMia Promise At LuxeMia, we're committed to bringing you authentic Indian ethnic wear with uncompromising quality and craftsmanship. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we stand behind every piece we create with our quality guarantee and excellent customer service. Color: Yellow

item.g:title: Wine Viscose Silk Wedding Saree with Embroidery | LuxeMia
item.g:description: Our Wine Viscose Silk Embroidery Saree is the ultimate choice for brides seeking a regal yet comfortable ensemble for their wedding day. This luxurious saree combines rich wine color with intricate embroidery work, making it perfect for traditional ceremonies while offering modern comfort for the modern NRI bride. Why Brides Choose Wine Viscose Silk Sarees Wine Viscose Silk sarees have become increasingly popular among NRI brides for their rich, royal appearance that photographs beautifully under various lighting conditions. The Viscose Silk fabric offers the luxurious sheen of traditional silk with added comfort and breathability, making it ideal for multi-hour wedding celebrations. This wine-colored saree provides a sophisticated alternative to conventional reds while maintaining the traditional essence expected in bridal wear. What Makes This Embroidery Saree Special Each Wine Viscose Silk Saree from LuxeMia features detailed embroidery work that showcases exceptional craftsmanship. The unstitched blouse piece allows for customization to perfectly fit your body type and personal style preference, making this saree a versatile addition to your wedding wardrobe that can be styled in multiple ways. Perfect For These Occasions Wedding Ceremonies - The rich wine color makes it an excellent choice for main wedding functions Reception Events - The elegant embroidery ensures you stand out during reception celebrations Engagement Functions - Perfect for pre-wedding celebrations where you want to make a statement Wedding Guest Attire - Sophisticated enough for attending weddings as a guest How to Style This Wine Saree Pair this Wine Viscose Silk Saree with gold or silver jewelry for a traditional bridal look. The rich color complements both warm and cool-toned metals beautifully. Style with a contrasting blouse in gold, ivory, or emerald green to create a striking visual impact. Complete the look with embellished heels or traditional mojris and a matching clutch for a cohesive bridal ensemble. Saree Sizing, Care & Shipping Includes unstitched 5.5 meter saree and 0.8 meter blouse piece - custom tailoring recommended for perfect fit Dry clean only - to preserve the embroidery work and fabric quality Free shipping to USA, Canada, Australia - delivered within 7-10 business days via premium courier Frequently Asked Questions Q: Is this saree suitable for a Mehendi ceremony? A: While primarily designed for weddings, the elegant wine color makes it suitable for pre-wedding functions like Mehendi, especially if you prefer a more subdued look than traditional bright colors. Q: How does the Viscose Silk fabric compare to traditional silk? A: Viscose Silk offers similar luxurious appearance and drape as traditional silk but with better breathability and wrinkle resistance, making it more comfortable for extended wear during wedding festivities. Q: Can I return this saree if it doesn't fit? A: Yes, LuxeMia offers a 15-day return policy. Since the blouse is unstitched, you can have it tailored to your measurements before finalizing the fit. The LuxeMia Promise Every Wine Viscose Silk Embroidery Saree from LuxeMia is carefully inspected for quality before shipping, ensuring you receive a product that meets our luxury standards. We pride ourselves on providing authentic Indian ethnic wear that makes NRI brides feel connected to their cultural roots, no matter where they are in the world. Color: Wine

item.g:title: Muted Salmon Tissue Silk Stone Setting Lehenga for Statement Ensemble
item.g:description: Couture Bridal Lehenga Choli Introducing - the perfect blend of traditional and modern fashion. This stunning lehenga is inspired by minimalism and sophistication. Made with premium glass tissue fabric, this lehenga exudes elegance and grace. Tailored for the bride who seeks an unmistakable couture presence, this ready-to-wear ensemble balances heritage craftsmanship with a modern silhouette, ensuring you carry the room the moment you enter. Every panel is finished by master karigars, and the palette is calibrated to flatter under both daylight ceremony mandaps and evening reception lighting. Lehenga Specifications Fabric: Tissue Silk — chosen for its luxurious drape, structural flare, and photographic richness Color: Muted Salmon — a couture shade curated for statement ensemble occasions Handwork: Stone Setting Handwork executed across the skirt panels, hand-applied by skilled artisans Flare: Generously flared kalidar construction for statement movement during bridal entry and vidaai Skirt Length: Standard ready-to-wear skirt length 42 inches; plus and custom-stitch tiers available for extended lengths Inner Lining: Premium inner cancan finish for volume retention throughout the celebration Hem Finish: Reinforced couture hem with concealed weighting for clean drape Blouse / Choli Fit & Customization Options Default Fit: Ready-to-wear standard cut finishing at the waist with concealed side hooks for a clean silhouette Standard Sizing: Fits bust up to 38 inches and waist up to 32 inches out of the box Plus Sizing: Plus variant fits bust up to 44 inches and waist up to 38 inches — select the Ready to Wear - Plus tier Custom Stitch Option: Need a different size or a deeper neckline, longer sleeves, or a redesigned back? Choose the Custom Stitched tier and submit measurements post-purchase Neckline Customization: Sweetheart, V-neck, boat neck, or high-neck — available with the Custom Stitched tier Sleeve Customization: Sleeveless, cap, elbow, three-quarter, or full sleeves — available with the Custom Stitched tier Back Design: Tie-back, hook-and-eye, or designer back detailing — available with the Custom Stitched tier Padding: Built-in bust pads included standard on every tier at no additional cost Dupatta Details Dupatta Fabric: Coordinated premium net or silk dupatta complementing the lehenga palette Embellishment: Stone Setting Handwork border detailing with scattered buttis across the body Drape Length: 2.25 to 2.5 meters, ideal for over-the-head and shoulder drape styles Finishing: Hand-rolled hem with concealed stitch for a couture-grade finish Style Note: Suitable for double-dupatta bridal styling; second dupatta available on request Styling Suggestions Jewelry Pairing: Complement the jewel tones palette with gold and kundan statement pieces — a choker with matching earrings and a maang tikka completes the bridal look Footwear: Opt for embellished juttis or block-heel sandals in metallic gold or blush to harmonize with the muted salmon lehenga Hairstyle: A low chignon with fresh florals or a side-swept curl with a paranda — both frame the face beautifully against stone setting handwork blouse detailing Makeup Direction: Soft smoky eyes with a dewy base and a jewel tones-toned lip balances the ornate tissue silk silhouette Occasion Pairing: Ideal for statement ensemble — style with a potli bag and kaleeras for full bridal impact, or pare back with a clutch for an engagement ceremony Photography Tip: The stone setting handwork catches natural light beautifully — schedule golden-hour portraits to maximize the couture impact Garment Care Cleaning: Dry clean only — do not hand wash, machine wash, or soak Storage: Store in a cool, dry place wrapped in muslin; avoid plastic covers to preserve fabric breathability Ironing: Reverse-iron on low heat; place a pressing cloth over stone setting handwork areas to protect threadwork Perfume: Apply perfume before wearing; avoid direct contact with tissue silk and embellished zones Packaging: Shipped in a premium garment box with tissue and silica gel protection Lead Time: Ready-to-wear dispatches in 5-7 business days; item.g:title: Maroon Silk Embroidery Lehenga Choli with Dupatta
item.g:description: Product Overview This Maroon lehenga choli in Silk is a perfect pick for your next festive celebration. Featuring beautiful embroidery work, this outfit brings together traditional craftsmanship and modern design. The premium Silk fabric offers a graceful drape and comfortable fit, making it ideal for all-day wear at festivals and cultural events. Design Details Fabric: Premium Silk known for its elegant sheen and comfortable drape. Lehenga Silhouette: Beautifully flared lehenga with a voluminous circular silhouette that creates graceful movement as you walk. Blouse/Choli: Matching Silk blouse piece with complementary embroidery work detailing. Can be customized to your preferred neckline and sleeve style. Dupatta: Festive matching dupatta in Silk with coordinated embroidery work and an ornate border. Lining: Soft cotton or satin lining for all-day comfort. Closure: Hook-and-eye with drawstring waistband for a secure, adjustable fit. Flair: Generous flare that creates a stunning silhouette. Styling Tips Style this maroon lehenga choli with statement jewelry — a choker necklace or layered necklaces with matching earrings work beautifully. Complete the look with embellished heels and a decorated clutch. For festivals and cultural events, opt for an elegant updo or soft waves, and consider a maang tikka for a traditional touch. Stitching Options Unstitched: Receive the lehenga, blouse, and dupatta as fabric pieces ready for tailoring. Total fabric: approximately 5-6 meters. Semi-Stitched: Lehenga skirt is partially stitched with side seams open. Blouse piece is pre-cut. Requires minimal tailoring. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements and our expert tailors will craft the outfit to your exact specifications. Standard customization at no extra cost. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. We accommodate every body type with our made-to-measure service. Blouse Customization: Choose your preferred neckline (round, V-neck, sweetheart, boat neck), sleeve length (sleeveless, short, 3/4, full), and blouse length. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL, 3XL, and Custom Size. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches. Size Bust (inches) Waist (inches) Hips (inches) XS 32 26 36 S 34 28 38 M 36 30 40 L 38 32 42 XL 40 34 44 XXL 42 36 46 3XL 44 38 48 Custom Provide your measurements at checkout Color: Maroon

item.g:title: Rani Pink Faux Georgette Embroidery Palazzo Suit with Dupatta
item.g:description: Shop the Rani Pink Faux Georgette Embroidery Palazzo Suit with Dupatta at LuxeMia — a Rani Pink palazzo suit in Faux Georgette with embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez paired with palazzo bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with embroidery to complete the ensemble. The kameez features embroidery on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the palazzo provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this palazzo suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with a statement necklace and kolhapuri sandals for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Every detail reflects the skill of Indian artisans, blending traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design for a garment that stands out at any occasion. The set includes a beautifully crafted kameez with coordinated bottoms, and a matching dupatta embellished with zari threadwork to complete the ensemble. The kameez features zari threadwork on the neckline, sleeves, and yoke, while the coordinated bottom provides a comfortable and flattering fit. The dupatta adds the finishing touch — drape it over one shoulder for classic elegance, or style it across both arms for a more structured look. Perfect for special occasions, this anarkali suit ensures you make a memorable impression wherever you go. Pair with jhumka earrings and a stack of bangles for a head-to-toe curated look that transitions effortlessly from intimate family gatherings to grand celebrations. This is a readymade suit — pre-stitched and ready to wear straight out of the box. Available in sizes S to XXL (bust 32-48), simply pick your size and go. Care: Professional dry cleaning is recommended to preserve the embroidery and fabric integrity. Avoid wringing or machine washing. Iron on low heat with a pressing cloth over embellished areas. Store in a muslin garment bag — avoid plastic covers which can trap moisture and damage embroidery. Color: Teal | Fabric: Silk | Work: Zari threadwork | Occasion: Special occasions Free shipping on orders over $350 to the USA, Canada, and Australia. Flat $25 shipping on orders under $350.

item.g:title: Pink Fendi Silk Embroidery Lehenga Choli
item.g:description: Product Overview This Pink lehenga choli in Fendi Silk is a perfect pick for your next special occasion. Featuring beautiful embroidery work, this outfit brings together traditional craftsmanship and modern design. The premium Fendi Silk fabric offers a graceful drape and comfortable fit, making it ideal for all-day wear. Design Details Fabric: Premium Fendi Silk known for its lightweight feel, elegant sheen, and comfortable drape. Silhouette: Flared lehenga skirt paired with a matching choli and dupatta. The voluminous silhouette creates a stunning bridal or festive look with beautiful movement. Neckline: Round neckline adorned with intricate embroidery that frames the face beautifully. Sleeves: Elegant full sleeves in Fendi Silk that complement the overall design. Dupatta: Comes with a matching fendi silk dupatta in pink featuring coordinated embroidery detailing. The dupatta length is approximately 2.25 meters, offering versatile draping options. Bottom: Voluminous lehenga skirt in fendi silk with a tailored waistband. Designed to flare beautifully and create stunning movement as you walk. Styling Tips Style this pink lehenga choli with gold or silver statement earrings and matching heels for a polished look at celebrations and gatherings. A sleek clutch and soft waves or a neat bun will complete the ensemble. For a more traditional touch, add bangles and a delicate necklace set. Stitching Options Ready-Made: Stitched and ready to wear. Available in standard sizes XS through 3XL. Select your size at checkout. Custom Stitching: Provide your measurements and our expert tailors will craft the outfit to your exact specifications. Includes standard customization at no extra cost. Custom Sizing: Available in all sizes including plus sizes. We accommodate every body type with our made-to-measure service. Size Variants Available in sizes XS, S, M, L, XL, 2XL, and 3XL. Custom sizing is available — provide your measurements at checkout for a tailored fit. Plus-size friendly. Size Chart Refer to the size chart below to find your perfect fit. All measurements are in inches.
